title: Cross Version and Cross Stack E2E

riskAssessment.reason: E2E evidence must distinguish real local execution, external not_run, and simulation.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance changes.

preReviewWarnings: Unavailable npm/Maven/toolchain lanes must be recorded as not_run, not simulated as executed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A real Python fixture executes Install through Update, Rollback, Disable/Enable, and Uninstall lifecycle phases.
Evidence distinguishes local real execution, external not_run, and simulation for TypeScript and Java lanes.
Cross-version Manifest, Schema, Rollback, and Uninstall evidence is traceable.
E2E tests and evidence classification pass without overclaiming unavailable toolchains.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Lifecycle confidence requires executable fixture evidence rather than manifest-only simulation, while unavailable external toolchains must remain honestly unrun.
constraints: At least one Python fixture runs locally end to end.
Other stacks may be not_run when toolchains are unavailable.
Evidence bundles label real, external-not-run, and simulated results separately.
intent.rationale: A traceable evidence classification keeps cross-stack coverage honest and repeatable.

rawUserRequest: 走完当前文档的流程；按计划逐个工单执行完整生命周期，包括 PR、合并、清理分支，直到全部工单完成。用户已授权所需确认范围。

declaredIntent.summary: Add executable cross-version lifecycle E2E evidence with honest toolchain classification.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Python lifecycle fixture executes real lifecycle phases.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized the complete serial remediation plan, including governance policy changes.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
